text.title: Pair with AI Agent Protocol Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from content/01-core-rules.xml. The skip-this-methodology branch is always reachable.

decision-tree.root-question: Is the agent making non-trivial code or system changes (commits, migrations, deploys)?

conclusion.verdict: block session until a test exists

branch.when: agent_role == co_author AND transcript_link == null AND ready_to_merge == true
